body:
* chore(examples): make html & css of next example valid

Invalid html elements were used here, which worked as divs, but is not valid.

I've also moved the static folder inside /public, since there was a warning: https://err.sh/zeit/next.js/static-dir-deprecated

* update snapshot

* Update examples/next/components/head.js
